markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting between Yourco and GrowthX to align on SEO strategy and growth goals.](https://fathom.video/share/ee9RC7iPJ4TeaEZ9NqB8KmK2zFCEr241?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Yourco aims to double SEO-driven leads from 6-7 to 15+ per month, with a focus on scaling mid-market deals](https://fathom.video/share/ee9RC7iPJ4TeaEZ9NqB8KmK2zFCEr241?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Current top growth channels are SEO and outbound, with partner channels showing promise](https://fathom.video/share/ee9RC7iPJ4TeaEZ9NqB8KmK2zFCEr241?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
  - [GrowthX will develop a comprehensive content strategy, focusing on industry-specific use cases and compliance topics](https://fathom.video/share/ee9RC7iPJ4TeaEZ9NqB8KmK2zFCEr241?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)
  - [Next steps include sharing customer data, competitor info, and setting up regular check-ins](https://fathom.video/share/ee9RC7iPJ4TeaEZ9NqB8KmK2zFCEr241?tab=summary&timestamp=3124.0)

## Topics

### Current Growth Metrics and Goals

  - [Yourco approaching $1M ARR, aiming to triple to $3M in 12 months](https://fathom.video/share/ee9RC7iPJ4TeaEZ9NqB8KmK2zFCEr241?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [Currently getting 6-7 SEO-driven leads per month, targeting 15+](https://fathom.video/share/ee9RC7iPJ4TeaEZ9NqB8KmK2zFCEr241?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Top growth channels: SEO (40%) and outbound email (60%)](https://fathom.video/share/ee9RC7iPJ4TeaEZ9NqB8KmK2zFCEr241?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Partner channel showing recent traction (4 leads that morning)](https://fathom.video/share/ee9RC7iPJ4TeaEZ9NqB8KmK2zFCEr241?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)

### Target Customer Profile

  - [Industries: Manufacturing, construction, transportation/warehousing, agriculture](https://fathom.video/share/ee9RC7iPJ4TeaEZ9NqB8KmK2zFCEr241?tab=summary&timestamp=1825.0)
  - Company size: SMB (\<200 employees) and mid-market (200-2000+ employees)
  - [Key roles: HR titles (HR manager to CHRO), IT, operations, communications](https://fathom.video/share/ee9RC7iPJ4TeaEZ9NqB8KmK2zFCEr241?tab=summary&timestamp=1964.0)
  - [Pain point: Ineffective communication with non-desk workforce](https://fathom.video/share/ee9RC7iPJ4TeaEZ9NqB8KmK2zFCEr241?tab=summary&timestamp=2155.0)

### Product Use Cases

  - [Primary: Emergency notifications, employee engagement surveys, benefits communication](https://fathom.video/share/ee9RC7iPJ4TeaEZ9NqB8KmK2zFCEr241?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Expanding: Operational use cases (scheduling, SOPs, safety protocols)](https://fathom.video/share/ee9RC7iPJ4TeaEZ9NqB8KmK2zFCEr241?tab=summary&timestamp=2651.0)
  - [Unique feature: Automatic translation for multilingual workforces](https://fathom.video/share/ee9RC7iPJ4TeaEZ9NqB8KmK2zFCEr241?tab=summary&timestamp=2743.0)

### SEO Strategy Discussion

  - [Focus on building topical authority around industries](https://fathom.video/share/ee9RC7iPJ4TeaEZ9NqB8KmK2zFCEr241?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)
  - [Create content clusters based on use cases, adapting for different industries](https://fathom.video/share/ee9RC7iPJ4TeaEZ9NqB8KmK2zFCEr241?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)
  - [Develop templates, guides, and resources valuable to both prospects and current users](https://fathom.video/share/ee9RC7iPJ4TeaEZ9NqB8KmK2zFCEr241?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)
  - [Address industry-specific compliance and regulation topics (e.g. union-related content)](https://fathom.video/share/ee9RC7iPJ4TeaEZ9NqB8KmK2zFCEr241?tab=summary&timestamp=3051.0)

### GrowthX Approach

  - [Phased strategy: Establish high-quality publishing cadence → Refine and enrich content → Optimize conversion](https://fathom.video/share/ee9RC7iPJ4TeaEZ9NqB8KmK2zFCEr241?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating "irresistible offers" to capture leads (e.g. industry-specific guides)](https://fathom.video/share/ee9RC7iPJ4TeaEZ9NqB8KmK2zFCEr241?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)
  - [Focus on human-centric content creation, not chasing SEO trends](https://fathom.video/share/ee9RC7iPJ4TeaEZ9NqB8KmK2zFCEr241?tab=summary&timestamp=3414.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sevira to schedule walkthrough of Yourco's current publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/ee9RC7iPJ4TeaEZ9NqB8KmK2zFCEr241?tab=summary&timestamp=3129.0)
  - [Yourco to share customer data, competitor lists, and any relevant internal documents](https://fathom.video/share/ee9RC7iPJ4TeaEZ9NqB8KmK2zFCEr241?tab=summary&timestamp=3156.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop initial content strategy and 12-month roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/ee9RC7iPJ4TeaEZ9NqB8KmK2zFCEr241?tab=summary&timestamp=3124.0)
  - [Create one sample article for calibration and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/ee9RC7iPJ4TeaEZ9NqB8KmK2zFCEr241?tab=summary&timestamp=3240.0)
  - [Schedule regular weekly check-ins (30 minutes, preferably Wed/Thurs)](https://fathom.video/share/ee9RC7iPJ4TeaEZ9NqB8KmK2zFCEr241?tab=summary&timestamp=3268.0)
  - [Brodie to share typical sales presentation recording for GrowthX team review](https://fathom.video/share/ee9RC7iPJ4TeaEZ9NqB8KmK2zFCEr241?tab=summary&timestamp=3331.0)
